strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing direct engagement with current AI tooling
Founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform actively used in production — demonstrates entrepreneurial execution within a technical domain
concerns: AI work is nascent and limited to ~2 months (April 2025–present); no demonstrated AI products shipped at scale, no ML background, and no formal AI/ML education

No evidence of director-level IC scope — all roles are individual contributor software development with no record of strategic customer advisory, cross-org influence, or shaping technical roadmaps at scale

Education is a BS in Computer Science plus a Fine Arts degree; role explicitly prefers a master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and the candidate's background does not compensate with equivalent applied AI depth
response.justification: The role demands a director-level IC who can advise strategic customers on AI adoption, shape cloud product futures, and demonstrate a track record of AI-powered platforms. Bogdan Szabo is a skilled full-stack engineer with strong breadth across languages and stacks, but his AI engagement is limited to roughly two months of agentic tooling work at his current employer — there is no evidence of AI products shipped at meaningful scale, no ML/AI academic background, and no record of operating in a strategic advisory or organizational influence capacity. His GISCollective founder experience shows entrepreneurial instinct, but the platform is niche and open-source, not the kind of commercial AI platform the role is looking for. The experience volume meets the minimum bar; the experience type does not match the principal-level AI strategy mandate.
